overnight_news: **Iran vows to escalate attacks** as war enters sixth day, driving Brent crude over $83 (+2.6%) and fueling inflation fears; impacts energy (XLE), defense (RTX, NOC, NOC), oil prices.[1][2][3][4]
**Broadcom issues bullish AI chip sales forecast**, challenging Nvidia in AI race; affects AVGO, NVDA.[4]
**Morgan Stanley cuts 3% of global workforce** across business lines; impacts MS, broader financials.[4]
**Oil spikes to $83+ on Strait of Hormuz threats**, with Trump pledging US Navy escorts if needed; boosts energy stocks, pressures inflation/Fed cuts.[2][3][4]
**RTX gains focus from US-Iran strikes** emphasizing anti-drone tech; positive for RTX defense stock.[1]
